name: room-23
description: Room 23 — premium vintage archive and wellness collective built with Fable 5, Elmish and Feliz

scripts.start: dotnet tool restore && dotnet fable watch src/App.fsproj -o build --run vite --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3000
scripts.dev: dotnet tool restore && dotnet fable watch src/App.fsproj -o build --run vite
scripts.build: export PATH="$HOME/.dotnet:$PATH" && dotnet tool restore && dotnet fable src/App.fsproj -o build && vite build
